# PromptMatrix

> Open-source CI/CD pipeline prompt management and governance tool for AI teams. MIT licensed.

PromptMatrix is a developer tool for managing, versioning, and governing LLM prompts inside CI/CD pipelines. Built by Matrix Labs. Free community edition available — self-host with Docker.

## Product

- [Landing page](https://promptmatrix.github.io/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://promptmatrix.github.io/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://promptmatrix.github.io/terms.html)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/PromptMatrix/Promptmatrix)
- [Matrix Labs Agency](https://matrixlabs.agency/promptmatrix.html)

## Key Features

- **Prompt Version Control**: Git-style versioning for every LLM prompt. Full audit trail.
- **CI/CD Integration**: Integrate prompt governance directly into your deployment pipeline.
- **Human Review Workflows**: Require approval before prompts reach production.
- **LLM-as-Judge Evals**: Automated quality gates using LLM evaluation before merge.
- **Sub-10ms Serving**: Production-grade prompt API serving with AES-256-GCM encryption.
- **Zero-redeploy Updates**: Update prompts live without touching your codebase.

## Pricing

- **Community Edition**: Free, MIT licensed, unlimited local prompts, self-hosted.
- **Starter**: $29/mo — 100 prompts, 3 seats, 60 RPM. Managed cloud.
- **Pro**: $79/mo — 400 prompts, 5 seats, 200 RPM. LLM evals.
- **Scale**: $199/mo — 1,000 prompts, 10 seats, 500 RPM.
- **Founder**: $499 lifetime — 500 prompts, 5 seats, 100 RPM. Hardcapped at 100 orgs.
- **Enterprise**: Custom — 5,000+ prompts, SSO, dedicated infra, SLA.
